name: Iya Basira - Amala & Ewedu
description: Traditional Yoruba amala and ewedu spot known for peppery soup bases and filling weekday meals.

name: Chicken Republic - Spicy Refuel Meal
description: Branded quick-service chicken and rice meal with spicy sauce options and broad Lagos availability.

name: Sweet Sensation - Pepper Soup
description: Pepper-forward chain favourite with familiar Nigerian soup flavour and reliable takeaway service.

name: Tantalizers - Suya Wrap
description: Affordable suya-inspired wrap with onions and pepper seasoning, positioned as a light quick meal.

name: Mr Bigg's - Jollof Combo
description: Affordable jollof rice combo from a familiar Nigerian fast-food brand.

name: Ofada Boy - Ofada Rice & Ayamase
description: Ofada rice with ayamase sauce for diners who prefer strong local flavour and heat.

name: Buka Hut - Egusi & Pounded Yam
description: Hearty egusi soup and swallow option for customers who want a substantial Nigerian meal.

name: Pizza Jungle - BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Casual pizza option with sweet BBQ chicken toppings and shareable sizing.

name: Domino's - Pepperoni Personal Pan
description: Personal-size pepperoni pizza from a widely available chain with predictable preparation.

name: Kilimanjaro - Rice & Chicken
description: Straightforward rice and chicken combo with broad appeal and consistent chain service.

name: The Place - Asun Rice
description: Rice meal paired with spicy asun for customers who want a peppery protein-forward lunch.

name: Cafeteria NG - Beans Porridge
description: Budget beans porridge with plantain, suited to filling low-cost meals.

name: Chowdeck - Food Delivery
description: Nigerian food and grocery delivery app with wide restaurant coverage in major cities.

name: GTWorld - Mobile Banking
description: Mobile banking app for GTBank customers managing transfers, cards, and account services.

name: Konga - Online Marketplace
description: Nigerian e-commerce marketplace for electronics, groceries, household items, and delivery orders.

name: myMTN NG - Self Service
description: MTN Nigeria app for airtime, data bundles, account checks, and subscription management.

name: PalmPay - Wallet
description: Mobile wallet for transfers, bill payments, airtime purchases, and everyday Nigerian payments.

name: Terra Kulture
description: Lagos arts, food, theatre, and culture venue suitable for visitors who want Nigerian creative experiences.

name: Nike Art Gallery
description: Large Lagos art gallery with Nigerian visual art and a calm browsing experience.

name: Jabi Lake Mall
description: Abuja mall with restaurants, shops, cinema access, and lake views for group outings.

name: Freedom Park Lagos
description: Historic Lagos Island venue for music, food, arts, and outdoor cultural events.

name: Balogun Market - Ankara Shopping
description: Busy Lagos market for ankara, fabrics, and bargain fashion shopping.

name: King of Boys
description: Nollywood political crime drama with power struggles, Lagos grit, and strong lead performance.

name: Anikulapo
description: Yoruba epic fantasy drama with folklore, romance, betrayal, and strong cultural production design.

name: Battle on Buka Street
description: Comedy-drama built around family rivalry and Nigerian food-business competition.

name: The Trade
description: Nigerian crime thriller focused on kidnapping, investigation, and moral pressure.

name: Tems - Born in the Wild
description: Soulful Afrobeats and R&B album for reflective listening and polished vocal production.

name: Asake - Work of Art
description: Energetic street-pop and amapiano-inflected Afrobeats with Lagos party momentum.

name: Burna Boy - I Told Them
description: Confident Afrofusion album with global production, Nigerian swagger, and stadium-scale hooks.

name: Ayra Starr - The Year I Turned 21
description: Youthful Afropop album balancing confidence, romance, and reflective coming-of-age songs.
